title: BREAKING: Iran's IRGC stopped Israeli-linked vessel on fire in Strait of Hormuz after drone strike
snippet: IRGC drone hit vessel in Strait of Hormuz. Ship currently on fire. Escalation of maritime conflict.

title: IRAN FM ARAGHCHI: Israel-US bombed Bushehr nuclear plant four times. Radioactive fallout will impact GCC capitals.
snippet: Araghchi warns of radioactive fallout from Bushehr nuclear plant strikes affecting Gulf capitals.

title: BREAKING: Trump wont say what US will do if missing F-15E pilot harmed — First US aviator shot down over enemy territory since Iraq A-10
snippet: First American aviator shot down over enemy territory since Iraq. Trump silent on consequences.

title: BREAKING: Second US combat plane crashed near Strait of Hormuz. Lone pilot safely rescued.
snippet: Second US combat plane crashed near Hormuz same time F-15E was shot down in Iran. Lone pilot rescued.

title: BREAKING: US F-15E shot down over Iran. Condition of 2 pilots unknown. WSJ
snippet: US F-15E shot down over Iran. Two pilots aboard. Condition unknown. First US aircraft shot down by enemy fire in this conflict.

title: One F-15E pilot rescued from southern Iran. Second still missing. Channel 12.
snippet: One of two F-15E pilots rescued from southern Iran. Search ongoing for second pilot.

title: Iran told mediators not willing to meet US officials in Pakistan. Demands 'unacceptable.' Dead end.
snippet: Iran rejected US demands via mediators. Ceasefire efforts at dead end per WSJ.

title: Iran Speaker on downed F-15E: War downgraded from 'regime change' to 'Can anyone find our pilot?'
snippet: Iran parliament speaker mocks US military situation after F-15E downing.

title: PRESIDENT TRUMP: Keep the oil, anyone?
snippet: Trump comment on Iran oil. High engagement post.

title: Global energy crisis: Middle East oil product exports -63pct in March. Biggest in history.
snippet: Middle East oil exports -63pct in March. Global energy crisis worst on record.

title: CDS volume Q1 2026 surged +69pct to $4.5 trillion. Highest on record.
snippet: Credit default swap volume at record high. Exceeds Q2 2025 tariff turmoil levels.

title: Hedge funds sold world equities fastest pace in 10 years. Short/long ratio 7.6:1.
snippet: Hedge funds aggressively shorting global stocks. 4th consecutive monthly sale.

title: Fed inflation expectations exceed 5pct. US lost -133000 jobs in Feb. Largest since Dec 2020.
snippet: Fed worst scenario: inflation expectations over 5pct, record job losses.

title: Germany requires all men aged 17-45 to get Bundeswehr permission before leaving country.
snippet: Germany military mobilization of young men. Unprecedented domestic policy.

title: Has Concern Over Hormuz Made Us Forget The Red Sea?
snippet: Red Sea security concerns rising as Hormuz dominates headlines. Oil shipping disruption expanding.

title: America Dependent On Chinese Electrical Parts For AI Build-Out
snippet: US AI infrastructure dependent on Chinese electrical components.

title: What Might Transatlantic Security Look Like If The US Leaves NATO?
snippet: NATO security analysis if US withdraws. Poland, Baltic, Turkey bilateral deals.

title: 40-country coalition led by UK to secure Strait of Hormuz. Trump demanded aid.
snippet: International Hormuz coalition forming. Netherlands led by UK. Not just oil protection.

title: France made deal with Iran behind Trump back to get container ship through Hormuz.
snippet: France bypassed US to negotiate Iran oil shipment. War legitimacy questioned.

title: Trump locked in WH on Good Friday. 2-day ceasefire request declined. Stuck.
snippet: Trump unable to get ceasefire. Iran refused deal. Political isolation.

title: Trump tariffs pushed prices so high no way back to normal. Hassett wrong.
snippet: Trump tariffs and chaos created irreversible inflation. Recovery projections false.

title: BREAKING: Iran rejected a US proposal for a 48-hour ceasefire
snippet: Iran rejected US ceasefire proposal. Negotiations at dead end.

title: WSJ: Mediators efforts to reach a ceasefire between Iran and the US have reached a dead end
snippet: WSJ confirms ceasefire talks dead end.

title: JUST IN: President Trump to unveil $1.5 trillion defense budget, largest yearly US military spending increase since World War II
snippet: Trump defense budget largest since WWII.
